title: Universal Trinkets
description: Modular, command-powered trinkets for mapmakers, mod-pack devs, and power players.
body: Modular, command-powered trinkets for mapmakers, modpack devs, and power players. Universal Trinkets adds 10 fully customizable items that can execute Minecraft commands when used. Whether you're building a modpack, custom map, or event-based survival world, these trinkets give you flexible, command-driven control — no code or datapacks required. 🛠️ **Configuration** Trinkets are configured using standard Minecraft commands (not JSON or scripts). Just assign your desired commands in the config file, and the trinket will run them when right-clicked. Supports multiple commands per trinket, teleporting, summoning, giving items, structure placement, and more. 🔥 **Key Features** - 10 separate trinket items, each with its own config - Executes Minecraft commands on use (e.g. /tp, /give, /summon, /fill, etc.) - Customize name, lore, and texture per trinket (Via simple resource pack) - Compatible with recipes, loot tables, and advancements - Zero scripting or data packs needed — just native Minecraft mechanics 🎮 **Example Use Cases** - Quest Reward: A trinket teleports the player to a dimension of diamonds for 30 seconds, then returns them. - Structure Placement: A crafted trinket builds a prefab base or dungeon when used. - Boss Summon: Trigger a boss fight or mob wave with a cursed trinket. - Custom Event Trigger: Run a full command chain on click — particles, messages, effects, and more. 💡 **Great For:** - Quest-based modpacks - Custom maps - Adventure/RPG servers - Survival enhancements - Puzzle, story, or event triggers - These trinkets aren’t just versatile — they’re UNIVERSAL! More Features planned to come in the future! Item names and Texture can be easily changed via Resource pack! For any questions/suggestions please join my discord! **All Rights Reserved** Modpack authors and map creators are free to use this mod in their creations without asking for permission.
